entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 224,432Chapters: 27/29Kudos: 217

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: We're Not Who We Used to Be
entry.summary:
Author: BekahRose

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,664Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Hope settles somewhere in the vicinity of his ribcage when Buck looks back into the house, and Eddie notices the hesitation slowly start to replace the tension in his shoulders, and he thinks that… this is it. Buck's going to take him up on his offer, and they'll go back to the house on South Bedford and…"Rain-check?" Buck asks with a tiny wiggle of his head. "I think I'm just gonna go crash. Sleep's been a bit messed up."The hope sinks like a lead balloon, which is to say it plummets with great speed down through Eddie's gut that he's shocked it doesn't leave a crater in Buck's stoop all the way through to Earth's mantle.ORFollowing their kitchen conversation and dinner, Eddie ruminates on what is happening to them in the wake of New Mexico

entry.title: You Could’ve Had Me, All These Years
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,316Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: “Um, Eddie, can I see your left hand please.” Eddie complies instantly, not bothering to ask why. “I— I think we’re married.” Eddie turns his head in a swift movement. “Married? That- that’s not possible.” Or On Buck’s first day back with the 118, they get a call at an occult shop. The next day, Buck and Eddie wake up 4 years in the future, in an unfamiliar home, married, with 3 kids.

entry.title: 1 year anniversary
entry.summary:
Author: ElioUnbound

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,477Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: NeymarJrIsASexyDaddy28  How about Buck and Eddie had to work on their anniversary ,Buck go home First but Eddie should stay for 8 hours more but Eddie already conviced the Captain to find someone else to Change sub him for that shift cause It was their anniversary.Eddie go home and hour later to Surprise Buck and spend their anniversary toghether but It was Buck to Surprise him instead cause Buck was fucking a 8yo Christopher on their couch/kitchen

entry.title: Hometown Christmas
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiefan95

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,243Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 16

Summary: Buck us a successful children's author, but he would like to try his hand at something new. He is struggling with his new story and his editor isn't supportive. So he decides to call his old high school teacher Bobby. Who has been like a mentor to him and has always supported him. Bobby suggests he get away from the city for a little while and invites him to come to his place for Christmas. What happens when he runs into an old classmate that he used to have a crush on.

entry.title: Almost becomes now
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,863Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 12

Summary: After a week of Buck serving as interim captain, Bobby’s back, the 118 is settling into its usual rhythm, and absolutely nothing feels normal anymore.Because Eddie looked at Buck differently when he was in charge. Buck noticed. Eddie noticed Buck noticing. The whole station definitely noticed.And after one almost-confession on the loft balcony, “later” has finally become “now.”

entry.title: just keep swimming (hoping)
entry.summary:
Author: lous_sunfl0wer

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,562Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 520

Summary: Eddie and Buck have been married for years, after a chance meeting during Eddie's second deployment. After he applied for the fire academy, Buck had to go overseas one last time. But he goes missing during a mission and after almost a year, Eddie is close to giving up hope. Oh, and he accidentally never told his colleagues about his husband.

entry.title: The ultimate mother son team up
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,674Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 159

Summary: “Being a realtor doesn’t give you the legal right to fly over her property.” Buck piped up as he reached the small group, earning a slightly surprised look from the man. “You may have been given permission by the owners of the home that you’re trying to film but you didn’t get this ladies permission which means you were still breaking the law.”“Thank you Buck-“ Athena shot him an amused look and Buck shot her a grin back.“Just coming over to check on you.”“And to make up for missing family dinner hm?”“You know it mama.”...A call involving a drone comes in and Buck and Athena don't like the man behind the drone.

entry.title: What Good Is A Deer With Broken Antlers?
entry.summary:
Author: The_Trinket_Crow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,083Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Eddie Diaz leaves that small town in New Mexico with a sense that he was missing something important. Having not found the truck on Bonnie and Earl’s property, and after weeks of searching, he has to return to LA without his friend. The months go by as the 118 and all their loved ones try to grapple with the loss of one of their own again. That is until a familiar face appears in the one place nobody thought to look.

entry.title: knocking at your door
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,901Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 192

Summary: “Buck,” Eddie manages, voice faint. “I’m trying to be—professional.”“You’re trying to let me down easy,” Buck replies quietly. “Right. Because I don’t know what I’m doing. Because I’m your TA. Because I’m young. Am I right?”Eddie stays quiet for a beat, pulse thundering in his ears. He is right. Eddie told him as much the last time he was in this office.“I-I know what I want, Eddie,” Buck says eventually, filling the silence. “I know what I’m doing. I came onto you. I’ve been trying to make you notice me for— for months, man. I wanted you to look at me.”Like his gaze is pulled by Buck’s words alone, Eddie lifts his head. Their eyes meet. Buck’s are so pretty—mile-long flaxen lashes framing the nicest blue Eddie has ever seen.“Yeah,” Buck breathes out, a small smile tugging at his lips. “Like that.”Or: Professor Eddie Diaz and his frat boy TA.

entry.title: Coming to Terms
entry.summary:
Author: Slow_Burn_Scholar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 620Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 56

Summary: For Buck and Eddie, the ultimate aphrodisiac isn't found in whispered praise, but in the cold, hard evidence of their permanence. What starts as an intense physical encounter quickly spirals into a feverish exchange of legal milestones and financial deep-dives, where the "boring" logistics of adult life become the highest form of foreplay. As the lines between their individual lives finally blur into one, they discover that nothing is quite as intoxicating as the paperwork that proves they are locked in for good. --or-- Buck and Eddie are horny over the permanence and domesticity of marriage.

entry.title: no alarms and no surprises (please)
entry.summary:
Author: bubbleaurum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,117Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 33

Summary: Hi, journal. Weird start, I don’t know how to start. I guess hi, me. This is the first entry of the journal for Dr. Copeland. I don’t really get how it will help, but she’s good at this, so this is probably good too. I didn’t tell her today, but I made the appointment because I’m lonely. I’m really, really lonely. And I don’t know how to say that out loud yet. Hopefully writing it will help. He puts the pen down and decides that’s enough effort for the first day. He checks his phone, thinking maybe he didn’t notice it buzzing while he wrote. No new messages....... Eddie’s in Texas. Maddie is getting ready for baby number 2. Bobby and Athena are building a new house. Everyone is busy with their family, and Buck doesn’t seem to fit anywhere. Dr. Copeland has him start to keep a journal to keep track of how he’s feeling, and all it does is (somehow) make everything worse. When a bad call lands Bobby in a coma and brings Eddie back everything becomes overwhelming fast. Buck starts leaning on his old habits, and it’s not long until he spirals out of control.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Starting Anew (Will you be there too?)
entry.summary:
Author: Begen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,095Chapters: 21/29Kudos: 501

Summary: Ever since losing his team and leaving the Seals, Buck has been alone, haunted by his past. His arrival at the 118 provides him a chance to move forward, but his past is never too far behind.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Hermit, the Devil, and the Star
entry.summary:
Author: thetalee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,966Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 454

Summary: Buck is back at the 118, and Eddie's healed from the sniper, but that doesn't mean everything's rainbows and unicorns. He knows there's something wrong with Maddie, no matter how many times she and Chimney say everything's fine. He knows there's something wrong with Eddie, even if his boyfriend insists otherwise. At least everything seems to be okay with Daniel, this time.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: catch me if you can
entry.summary:
Author: twobirdsonesong

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,447Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 139

Summary: Now, Buck’s backyard and home are bustling with the 118 family – the younger kids running around in various levels of Easter Best, the first generation watching with fond amusement, the parents sitting back with drinks and letting the older kids play unpaid babysitter. It’s nice. It’s loud and a little chaotic and someone’s probably going to get a skinned knee before the end of the day and it’s nice. Eddie wants for more days like this.or: a very buddie Easter

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The family you choose>the family you’re born with.
entry.summary:
Author: Bylerisaworkofart

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 390Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: a texting fic that is MAJORLY inspired by 'our real family' by kennedyelizabeth i love it SOSOSOSO much i decided to make my own. i hope you guys like this!!

entry.title: Tower Made of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: Brixon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 267,430Chapters: 26/32Kudos: 270

Summary: Prince Evan, affectionately known as Buck, is the heir his parents never wanted. He’s abandoned all royal duties in favor of throwing outlandish parties and expensive vacations. Unfortunately, after his father steps down, Buck has to fulfill two of his most hated royal duties — kingship and marriage. OR: When Buck meets Eddie, he decides the surest way to anger his parents and the council is to marry a kitchen cook. When Eddie meets Prince Evan, he wants to know whether it would be considered treason to push a prince off of the nearest cliff.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
